title: Paint the Town
description: Río has lived in the same dusty town her whole life and she's pretty sure nothing here will ever be different. Then a new girl named Sunny moves in across the street, and she has spray paint, and ideas, and a way of looking at the world like it's a wall waiting to be painted. A bright, hopeful teen story about art, first feelings, and changing a place that swears it can't change.
